name: @thi.ng/cellular
when_to_use: 教元胞自动机/涌现/自组织/Wolfram 分类/Rule 110 图灵完备时用:配 [{ kernel: WOLFRAM3, rule, states:2, reset:false }] 迭代出各代格点(Uint8Array),你画时空演化图。仅 1D 初等 CA——二维生命游戏它不做。
why_valuable: 高度可定制的 1D 元胞自动机(Wolfram 初等 CA、多态、共享环境),几行产出 Rule 30/90/110 的时空演化;AI 徒手迭代多代格点易错,它把规则编码与邻域求解固定住。

en.when_to_use: Use it to teach cellular automata, emergence, self-organization, Wolfram classification, or Rule 110 Turing completeness. With [{ kernel: WOLFRAM3, rule, states:2, reset:false }], iterate generations of cells as Uint8Array values and draw the space-time evolution. It supports only 1D elementary CA, not the 2D Game of Life.
en.why_valuable: It provides highly configurable 1D cellular automata, including elementary Wolfram CA, multiple states, and shared environments, producing the space-time evolution of Rule 30/90/110 in a few lines. AI easily makes mistakes when iterating generations by hand; this library fixes rule encoding and neighborhood evaluation.

data_in.note: Only 1D elementary CA is supported; rule encoding depends on kernel size. Standard Wolfram configuration is { kernel: WOLFRAM3, states: 2, reset: false }. Pass an array of configuration objects plus width to the constructor.

schema.rule: number | bigint | string - Wolfram rule number such as 30/90/110; encoding depends on kernel size
schema.width: number - number of environment cells, or generation length; second constructor argument
schema.states?: number - number of cell states (standard Wolfram=2; must be <=256 because storage uses Uint8Array)
schema.kernel?: [number,number][] - neighborhood offset vectors; default exported WOLFRAM3 = [[-1,0],[0,0],[1,0]]
schema.reset?: boolean - whether to reset to zero at maximum age; standard two-state Wolfram should use false
schema.wrap?: boolean - wraparound boundary joining left and right; third constructor argument, default true

data_in.note: 仅 1D 初等 CA;规则编码依赖 kernel 大小。标准 Wolfram 配置 = { kernel: WOLFRAM3, states: 2, reset: false }。配置对象数组 + width 传给构造函数。

schema.rule: number | bigint | string —— Wolfram 规则号(如 30/90/110);编码依赖 kernel 大小
schema.width: number —— 环境格子数(每代长度),构造函数第二参
schema.states?: number —— 细胞状态数(标准 Wolfram=2;必须 ≤256,Uint8Array 存储)
schema.kernel?: [number,number][] —— 邻域偏移向量;默认用导出的 WOLFRAM3 = [[-1,0],[0,0],[1,0]]
schema.reset?: boolean —— 达最大 age 是否归零;标准 2 态 Wolfram 应设 false
schema.wrap?: boolean —— 环形边界(左右相连),构造函数第三参,默认 true

provides._note: headless-primitive:纯 JS CA 引擎,无渲染;每代读 current(Uint8Array)自绘。
provides.outputs: 逐代 Uint8Array(每次 update() 后读 ca.current),或用 updateImage() 一次填满整幅时空图;经典 Rule 30/90/110 演化。

api_surface.ctor: new MultiCA1D(configs: {kernel, rule, states, reset?}[], width, wrap?)
api_surface.step: ca.current(Uint8Array 当前代);ca.update() 计算下一代;ca.updateProbabilistic()
api_surface.batch: ca.updateImage(pixels, height, opts) 批量填一整幅图
api_surface.kernels: WOLFRAM3 / WOLFRAM5 / WOLFRAM7 标准邻域;randomRule1D(kernelSize) 生成随机规则 bigint

peer.note: p5 或裸 canvas 把每代 ca.current 画成一行像素,叠成时空演化格点图。

boot.note: 仅 1D 初等 CA(不做 2D 生命游戏)。标准 Wolfram = { kernel: WOLFRAM3, states: 2, reset: false },rule 传 30/90/110(number|bigint)。每代读 ca.current(Uint8Array)画一行到自建 canvas(定高 px 禁 vh);states 必须 ≤256;@thi.ng/api、@thi.ng/random 已被 +esm 打包。

isolation.evidence: API correct: +esm exports named MultiCA1D, WOLFRAM3, WOLFRAM5, WOLFRAM7, randomRule1D (export{L as MultiCA1D, S as WOLFRAM3, T as WOLFRAM5, $ as WOLFRAM7, P as randomRule1D}) — verified. 1d.d.ts: class MultiCA1D { constructor(configs: CASpec1D[], width, wrap?); get current: Uint8Array; update(); updateProbabilistic(); setPattern(...); setNoise(...); updateImage(pixels, height, opts) }; WOLFRAM3/5/7: Kernel; randomRule1D(kernelSize, rnd?) => bigint. Doc example uses new MultiCA1D([{ kernel:[[-1,0],[0,0],[1,0]], rule:110, states:2, reset:false }], 256) — matches schema. Limits: Uint8Array storage → states ≤256. Pure numeric CA engine: no DOM, no stylesheet, no events → shadow-safe; grid rendering is the consumer's canvas.
